{{Infobox group
| name = Titan Knight
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri returned in the uniform of a [[Titan Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A new [[Titan Knight]] is a potential goal or outcome.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knight]] is supposed to be on [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
